mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_cart (user_id, product_id, quantity) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id as cartId, p.id as productId, p.name as productName, p.price as price, c.quantity as quantity FROM t_cart c INNER JOIN t_product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId}
